title: Laus pvp
description: A high-performance 1.20.1 PvP client designed for maximum FPS, fluid combat animations, and zero input lag
body:
⚔️ Laus PvP | Performance & Combat Evolution
Laus PvP is a professional-grade modpack built for the modern Minecraft combat era (1.20.1). It is designed with one goal in mind: Absolute Performance. Whether you are playing on competitive practice servers or massive faction wars, Laus PvP ensures you stay ahead of the competition.

🚀 Performance & Frames
Stop losing fights because of lag. Laus PvP utilizes the latest optimization engines to squeeze every frame out of your hardware:

Sodium & Lithium: The gold standard for rendering and logic optimization.

Indium: Seamless compatibility for modern shaders and effects.

FerriteCore: Massive reduction in memory (RAM) usage.

⚔️ Advanced Combat Mechanics
Experience fluid and responsive battles with our carefully selected combat suite:

Better Combat: Enhances attack animations and hit synchronization.

Modern HUD: Real-time tracking for armor durability, potion effects, and hunger saturation (AppleSkin).

Enhanced Visuals: Low-fire effects and clear glass (Continuity) for maximum visibility during intense fights.

🛡️ Why Choose Laus PvP?
Clean & Legal: No bundled copyright material or stolen assets. This pack follows all Modrinth guidelines for a safe and fast installation.

Server Ready: Optimized for all major 1.20.1 multiplayer networks.

Low Latency: Minimalist design to ensure the lowest input lag possible
